# LoopLens GitHub Automation

This directory contains repository automation for LoopLens.

If you are reviewing the TestSprite Hackathon Season 3 submission, start with
the [main LoopLens README](../README.md). That root README includes the live app,
public proof report, screenshots, TestSprite evidence, and hackathon fit.

Planned use:

- GitHub Actions workflow files
- Optional TestSprite CI integration
- Future issue or PR templates

Current CI runs install, typecheck, unit tests, and production build.
